sn35.129:1.0.1: On one occasion the Venerable Ānanda was dwelling at Kosambı in Ghosita's Park. Then the householder Ghosita approached the Venerable Ānanda … and said to him:sn.iv.114"Venerable Ānanda, it is said, ‘diversity of elements, diversity of elements.’In what way, venerable sir, has the diversity of elements been spoken of by the Blessed One?"
